ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
title: Update on NPCBVI
text:
Press Release:Press Information Bureau

Ministry of Health and Family Welfare

Update on NPCBVI

396 Eye Banks Functional Across the Country, as Reported by States/UTs
Cornea Collection Registers Steady Growth, Rising from 62,370 in 2022-23 to 69,848 in 2024-25

Posted On:
23 MAR 2026 12:43PM by PIB Delhi

As per the information provided by various States/UTs  a total of  396  Eye banks are functional  across the Country.  The number of cornea collected  during 2022-23,2023-24 and 2024-25 are 62,370, 66,434  and 69,848  respectively

The  National Programme for Control of Blindness & Visual Impairment (NPCBVI) provides  for  strengthening  of eye banking and Cornea transplant services in the country. Under the programme, financial assistance is extended for infrastructure,  development, procurement of equipment and training of ophthalmologists and eye bank technicians. It also supports promotion of eye donation activities and free supply of cornea storage medium to  Government eye banks across the Country.

The Union Minister of State for Health and Family Welfare,
Shri. Prataprao Jadhav
 stated this in a written reply in the Lok Sabha today.

****

SR

HFW/ Update on NPCBVI/20 March 2026/2

(Release ID: 2243765)

Visitor Counter : 3
